entries.title: Commentary on Lamentations on lamentations 3:61
entries.excerpt: Third, is an accusation regarding sin from their mouth. The people here are accused of their sins. First, regarding the affliction in their shame: "Thou hast heard their taunts, O Lord, all their devices against me." Which declares, as if: there is no need for proof. For the prophet Daniel 9:16 asserts: "And for the iniquities of our fathers, Jerusalem and thy people have become a byword among all who are round about us."
